title: XINZUO Acacia Wood End-Grain Cutting Board with Hanging Hole,Small Rectangular Chopping, Serving Board/Block for Vegetables, Fruits, Cheese and Charcuterie,36 x 24 x1.9 cm
features: Natural Premium Acacia Wood - Acacia wood is very strong and durable, high density, corrosion-resistant, heat-resistant, not deformed, with a long service life.Each one is unqiue since the color and grain might vary a little bit due to the material of natural wood.Use it as a kitchen display, a charcuterie centerpiece, or a rustic serving platter for any occasion.

More Humanized Design - (14.1 x 9.4 x 0.75 inches), thickened and widened design makes the chopping board sturdier and more durable. With hanging holes, you can hang it on the wall, saving you space and decorating your kitchen at the same time. Rounded corners and no burrs to avoid cuts.

Knife-Friendly Design - Our cutting boards are made with a end-grain seamless stitching process, where the wood fibers rebound and repair themselves after being cut, acting as a blade protector. End grain cutting boards have a unique “self-healing” ability, where the wood fibers close and repair themselves after each cut, thus reducing the appearance of knife marks and keeping the board as new for a long time.

Reversible and Easy to Clean - Both front and back can be used, one side can be used as a tray and the other side can be used as a cutting board. it can also be used as a stylish serving board, a carving board, a bread cheese board,a grill board or a charcuterie board.We recommend washing it directly with water (hand wash) and storing it in a ventilated place. For long-term use, wipe the surface regularly with olive oil or walnut oil.

Reliable Kitchen Assistant - Presented in exquisite box makes it suitable for any occasion. Ideal for professional chefs, cooking enthusiasts, and beginners alike. Contact our customer service for any concerns, and we will gladly assist you.
